arts.sum: OGC Nice will be without their captain, Dante, for their trip to face Paris Saint-Germain at the Parc des Princes on Friday. Franck Haise also confirmed Tanguy Ndombélé’s continued absence…

arts.sum: OGC Nice captain Dante (41) has been ruled out of OGC Nice’s meeting against Paris Saint-Germain on Friday night with a knee issue, AFP understands. Dante also missed last Sunday’s match against…
